title: UCC INGO — Product Roadmap: Smarter Studio + Presentation + Live Updates
overview: Evolution of UCC INGO from a static CMS-backed website to a dynamic, real-time content platform. Three phases: (1) Smarter Sanity Studio Layout — organize the CMS for editor productivity, (2) Presentation Layer — rich previews and refactored front-end, (3) Live Content Updates — real-time pushes from CMS to website without manual refresh.

what_exists: Sanity Studio v3 with deskTool, presentationTool, visionTool
Grouped desk structure: Content / People / Structure (in deskStructure.js)
Field groups on thesis (5 groups: basic, content, media, members, metadata)
Field groups on award (4 groups: basic, media, content, metadata)
productionUrl resolver for all content types
Prefetcher component with client-side data fetching on mount
listenSanity() stub with incomplete typeQueryMap (empty query bodies)
GROQ query files in lib/groq/ (blog, bulletin, thesis, awards, gallery)
what_needs_improvement: No custom preview components for any schema type
award.js schema is 117 lines, recipient.js is 85 lines — could be simplified
Awards slug page is 232 lines using @material-tailwind/react (causes build issues)
Awards list page uses client-only data (Prefetcher), shows spinner on first load
listenSanity() has empty query strings in typeQueryMap — subscriptions don't work
No preview thumbnails in Studio document browser
No initial value templates beyond basic defaults
No default ordering in studio document lists (ordering exists in deskStructure)
No webhook receiver endpoint for on-demand ISR from external services
Prefetcher shows blocking loading overlay (no stale-while-revalidate pattern)
No presentation tool for visual live editing on the front-end

4.1.name: Smarter Sanity Studio Layout
4.1.objective: Optimize the CMS for editor productivity — organized sidebar, production previews, field grouping, simplified schemas, document badges, initial value templates, and newest-first ordering.

tasks.title: Production preview URLs for every content type
tasks.description: Verify resolveProductionUrl covers all 6 content types (blog, bulletin, thesis, award, gallery, council). Add preview components to each schema using S.preview() or custom prepare(). Ensure the 'Open preview' button appears in the Studio document pane for every type.
tasks.acceptance: Every document type in Studio shows a working 'Open preview' button linking to the correct front-end URL.

tasks.title: Field groups on all applicable schemas
tasks.description: Thesis already has 5 field groups. Award already has 4. Add field groups to blog (basic, content, metadata), bulletin (basic, content, metadata), gallery (basic, links, media). Ensure the groups are logically organized for content editors.
tasks.acceptance: Every schema with 6+ fields has field groups that collapse related fields.

tasks.title: Simplify recipient schema (85 -> ~40 lines)
tasks.description: Current recipient.js is 85 lines with nested fullName object. Flatten to single fullName string field. Remove middleInitial (rarely used). Simplify preview preparation. Keep slug auto-generation from fullName.
tasks.acceptance: recipient.js reduced to ~40 lines while preserving all functionality.

tasks.title: Simplify award schema (117 -> ~90 lines)
tasks.description: Current award.js is 117 lines. Consolidate validation rules, simplify field definitions. Remove redundant 'required' validators where schema type already implies requirement. Merge dateAwarded and academicYear into metadata group. Simplify tags and badges arrays.
tasks.acceptance: award.js reduced to ~90 lines with cleaner field organization.

tasks.title: Document badges, initial value templates, newest-first ordering
tasks.description: Add document badges to schemas (e.g., 'Published' badge for published docs). Add initialValue templates for common patterns (e.g., academic year default). Add default orderings to every schema type so Studio lists show newest first by default.
tasks.acceptance: Every document type shows a descriptive badge, has newest-first ordering, and sensible initial values.

tasks.title: Add missing dev script for studio
tasks.description: Studio package.json has 'dev': 'sanity dev' but the root concurrently command fails on Windows because 'sanity' isn't in PATH. Update the root package.json dev:studio script to use 'npx sanity dev' from the studio directory.
tasks.acceptance: npm run dev:studio starts Sanity Studio without 'sanity not recognized' error.

4.2.name: Presentation Layer
4.2.objective: Rich visual previews in the Studio document browser, refactored front-end pages, server-side data fetching for instant page loads, and organized filtering in desk structure.

tasks.title: Custom preview thumbnails in Studio document browser
tasks.description: Create preview components for all 11 schema types. Each preview shows a thumbnail image (if available), title, subtitle with key metadata (e.g., academic year, department, category), and a status badge. Use Sanity's preview.select and prepare() for each schema.
tasks.acceptance: Every schema type shows a rich preview card in the Studio document browser with image, title, and metadata subtitle.

tasks.title: Refactor awards slug page (232 -> ~120 lines)
tasks.description: Current awards/[slug].js is 232 lines with @material-tailwind/react components that break prerendering. Replace Tooltip/IconButton/Breadcrumbs/Chip with custom lightweight alternatives. Extract blockComponents to a shared file. Simplify the layout while preserving all functionality and visual design.
tasks.acceptance: Awards slug page is ~120 lines, builds without errors, and renders identically.

tasks.title: Server-side data fetching for all list pages
tasks.description: Convert all list pages (awards, blog, bulletin, thesis, gallery) to use getServerSideProps or getStaticProps with revalidation. Remove dependency on Prefetcher for initial data load. Each page fetches its own data at request time, eliminating the first-load spinner.
tasks.acceptance: All list pages render with full data on first paint — no loading spinner on initial navigation.

tasks.title: Default ordering and filters in desk structure
tasks.description: Add year-filter dropdowns to desk structure for thesis (by academic year) and awards (by category). Add searchable document lists for all content types. Ensure deskStructure.js uses S.documentTypeList() with proper filtering and ordering for every type.
tasks.acceptance: Editors can filter thesis by year and awards by category directly from the Studio sidebar.

tasks.title: Preview components for all 11 schema types
tasks.description: Build React preview components that render inside Sanity Studio's preview pane. Each preview shows a live-like rendering of the content: blog posts show title, header image, first paragraph; awards show title, image, recipients; thesis show title, department, members. Use sanity's component resolver for live preview.
tasks.acceptance: Each schema type has a live preview component that renders realistic content previews in the Studio.

4.3.name: Live Content Updates
4.3.objective: Real-time content synchronization from Sanity to the website — no manual refresh needed. Includes shared caching, on-demand ISR via webhooks, real-time client subscriptions, stale-while-revalidate pattern, and presentation tool for visual live editing.

tasks.title: Shared cache utility in lib/cache.js
tasks.description: The current lib/cache.js is already a generic TTL cache. Enhance it with: (1) LRU eviction when cache exceeds maxSize, (2) stats tracking (hit/miss counts), (3) multi-key invalidation by tag pattern, (4) async get-or-set helper. Replace the 3 existing ad-hoc caching patterns (siteConfig, chat API, prefetcher) to use this shared utility.
tasks.acceptance: lib/cache.js is the single source of truth for all client-side caching. Old ad-hoc caches are removed.

tasks.title: Enhance /api/revalidate webhook receiver
tasks.description: Current revalidate endpoint exists but uses 'revalidatePath' from 'next/server' (App Router API in a Pages Router project). Fix to use 'res.unstable_revalidate()' or the Pages Router equivalent. Add support for revalidating the homepage and sitemap. Add proper secret validation with SANITY_WEBHOOK_SECRET. Add better error logging.
tasks.acceptance: POST /api/revalidate correctly purges ISR cache for the specified type/slug on Vercel.

tasks.title: Sanity Studio document action to fire webhooks on publish
tasks.description: Current documentActions.js does a client-side fetch from the browser to /api/revalidate. This fails if the studio is on a different origin (CORS) or the site is behind auth. Fix to use Sanity's API directly via the Sanity client (using SANITY_API_TOKEN) to trigger revalidation server-side, or use Sanity's native webhook system instead.
tasks.acceptance: Publishing a document in Studio triggers ISR cache invalidation reliably (not via CORS fetch from browser).

tasks.title: client.listen() subscription for real-time client updates
tasks.description: Fix the listenSanity() function in lib/sanity.js — the typeQueryMap currently has empty string queries for all types. Fill in the actual GROQ queries that match the list queries. Add reconnection logic (with exponential backoff). Add visibility-based pause/resume (don't listen when tab is hidden).
tasks.acceptance: When content is published/updated in Sanity, the website receives the update in real-time without a page refresh.

tasks.title: Stale-while-revalidate Prefetcher
tasks.description: Refactor Prefetcher.js to implement stale-while-revalidate pattern: (1) Show cached/stale data immediately on mount, (2) Fetch fresh data in background, (3) Update UI when fresh data arrives. No more blocking loading state. Add error boundaries around each data type so one failure doesn't crash the whole app.
tasks.acceptance: Navigating to any page shows content immediately (from cache) while updating in the background.

tasks.title: Presentation tool for visual live editing
tasks.description: The studio already has presentationTool configured. Enhance it with: (1) Custom preview URL resolvers for all content types, (2) Focused preview that auto-scrolls to the edited content on the page, (3) Iframe communication between Studio and the front-end for real-time cursor/selection sync.
tasks.acceptance: Editors can use Presentation mode to see live changes as they type, with auto-scroll to the edited section.

tasks.title: GROQ query files in lib/groq/
tasks.description: All lib/groq/ files already exist. Audit them for: (1) Consistent field naming across queries, (2) Proper image URL resolutions for all image fields, (3) Coverage for all content types including siteConfig and council queries, (4) Add helper query fragments to reduce duplication.
tasks.acceptance: All GROQ queries follow a consistent pattern, include image URLs, and cover every content type.

tasks.title: Error boundaries and error handling
tasks.description: ErrorBoundary component already exists and wraps the app. Enhance with: (1) Sanity error logging (log errors to Sanity dataset for admin visibility), (2) Per-section error boundaries around each major content area (thesis list, blog list, awards, etc.), (3) Graceful degradation — if one section fails, the rest of the page still works.
tasks.acceptance: If Sanity API is down, individual sections show a friendly error message while the rest of the page works.

tasks.title: Sanity Admin write client (lib/sanity-admin.js)
tasks.description: restore the lib/sanity-admin.js with a write-enabled Sanity client using SANITY_API_TOKEN. This is needed for server-side mutations like error logging, creating audit records, and triggering revalidation from server contexts.
tasks.acceptance: Serverside code can write to Sanity using the admin client with proper token auth.

tasks.title: End-to-end data flow documentation
tasks.description: Update AGENTS.md with the new architecture. Document: (1) How content flows from Sanity → Webhook → ISR → Website, (2) How real-time updates work via client.listen(), (3) How Presentation mode works for editors, (4) Troubleshooting guide for each live-update layer.
tasks.acceptance: AGENTS.md has a complete 'Live Content Updates' section covering all new architecture.

commit_strategy.pattern: One commit per task (21 total commits across 3 phases)
example_commits: studio(smarter): add production preview URLs for all content types
studio(smarter): add field groups to blog, bulletin, and gallery schemas
studio(smarter): simplify recipient schema to ~40 lines
studio(smarter): simplify award schema to ~90 lines
studio(smarter): add badges, initial values, and default ordering
studio(smarter): fix studio dev script for Windows (npx sanity)
feat(presentation): add custom preview thumbnails to all schema types
feat(presentation): refactor awards slug page to ~120 lines
feat(presentation): add server-side data fetching for list pages
feat(presentation): add year/category filters to desk structure
feat(presentation): add preview components for all 11 schema types
feat(live): enhance shared cache utility with LRU and stats
feat(live): fix revalidate webhook for Pages Router
feat(live): fix document action to revalidate via API reliably
feat(live): implement real-time client.listen() subscription
feat(live): refactor Prefetcher with stale-while-revalidate
feat(live): enhance presentation tool with per-type preview
feat(live): audit and standardize GROQ query files
feat(live): add per-section error boundaries and error logging
feat(live): create Sanity admin write client
docs: update AGENTS.md with live content update architecture

technical_notes.material_tailwind_issue: Awards slug page breaks build with 'Cannot read properties of null (reading useContext)' due to @material-tailwind/react SSR incompatibility. Fix: replace with custom lightweight components or use next/dynamic with ssr: false.
technical_notes.revalidate_path_issue: pages/api/revalidate.js uses 'revalidatePath' from 'next/server' which is App Router only. For Pages Router, need to use 'res.unstable_revalidate()' pattern or the proper Pages Router ISR API.
technical_notes.listen_sanity_fix: The typeQueryMap in lib/sanity.js has empty query strings. Need to reference the actual GROQ queries from lib/groq/ or inline the list queries.
technical_notes.prefetcher_optimization: Current Prefetcher blocks rendering until all data is fetched. Should show cached data immediately and refresh in background (stale-while-revalidate).
technical_notes.studio_preview_setup: Presentation tool is configured but preview URL resolver needs to return correct URLs for all 6 content types. The resolveProductionUrl function already handles blog, bulletin, thesis, award, gallery — verify coverage.
technical_notes.windows_path_note: Root dev:studio script uses 'cd studio && sanity dev' but 'sanity' isn't in PATH on Windows. Fix: 'npx sanity dev' or use workspace script: 'npm run dev' from studio directory.
